name: Sino Green Land Corporation
summary: Sino Green Land Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale distribution, marketing, and sale of fruits and vegetables in Guangdong Province and north China. Its fruits include fuji apples, emperor bananas, and tangerine oranges; and vegetables comprise tomatoes, cauliflower, cucumber, lettuce, spinach, leek, celery, peppers, Chinese cabbage, carrots, loofah, pumpkin, bitter gourd, white gourd, gherkin, and yams. The company sells fruits through wholesale centers, and vegetables through supermarket chains. Sino Green Land Corporation is based in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
